/*
  SPRINT 14 — SCOPE LOCK (Sim4 / Loopforge)

  ARTIFACTS ONLY — NO REPLAY_* — NO LIVE SESSION

  This module participates in artifact export/replay. Sprint 14 forbids all live/session behavior:
  - No WebSockets or any bidirectional transport
  - No handshake / subscribe lifecycle
  - No REPLAY_* control messages (REPLAY_BEGIN, REPLAY_SEEK, REPLAY_READY, etc.)
  - No kernel-hosted or server-mediated replay
  - Do not simulate sessions offline (no mock handshakes, no stream controllers)

  Architectural guardrail:
  - Adding REPLAY_* messages, handshake logic, or any session assumptions is a SPEC VIOLATION for Sprint 14.
  - Viewers and tools must operate on artifacts (files) only; replay control is local viewer logic driven by manifests.

  Authority:
  - See docs/sprint14_scope_lock.md for the definitive Sprint 14 scope and enforcement guidance.

  Implementation note:
  - Treat this as a “do not cross” boundary. If a change requires transport, server presence, or runtime session state,
    it belongs to a future version (v0.2+) and must not land in Sprint 14.

  Copy/paste guidance for other languages:
  - Python:   wrap this block with triple quotes as a module docstring
  - TypeScript: keep as top-of-file comment
  - Go:       convert to // line comments at file top
*/
